
> terser-webpack-plugin@5.5.0 test:coverage
> npm run test:only -- --collectCoverageFrom="src/**/*.js" --coverage "--ci"


> terser-webpack-plugin@5.5.0 test:only
> cross-env NODE_ENV=test jest "--collectCoverageFrom=src/**/*.js" "--coverage" "--ci"

PASS test/getEcmaVersion.test.js
PASS test/worker.test.js
PASS test/validate-options.test.js
PASS test/minimizerOptions-option.test.js
PASS test/parallel-option.test.js
PASS test/include-option.test.js
PASS test/exclude-option.test.js
PASS test/test-option.test.js
PASS test/terserOptions-option.test.js (8.634 s)
PASS test/extractComments-option.test.js (13.069 s)
PASS test/TerserPlugin.test.js (16.638 s)
FAIL test/minify-option.test.js (20.434 s)
  ● minify option › should work using when the `minify` option is `cssnanoMinify`

    expect(received).toMatchSnapshot(hint)

    Snapshot name: `minify option should work using when the \`minify\` option is \`cssnanoMinify\`: assets 1`

    + Received  + 2

    -   "7ef9f914930a1190260b.css": ".foo{background:blue;color:red}.bar{margin:10px;padding:10px}",

__webpack_require__(moduleId) {\\n\\t// Check if module is in cache\\n\\tvar cachedModule = __webpack_module_cache__[moduleId];\\n\\tif (cachedModule !== undefined) {\\n\\t\\treturn cachedModule.exports;\\n\\t}\\n\\t// Create a new module (and put it into the cache)\\n\\tvar module = __webpack_module_cache__[moduleId] = {\\n\\t\\t// no module.id needed\\n\\t\\t// no module.loaded needed\\n\\t\\texports: {}\\n\\t};\\n\\n\\t// Execute the module function\\n\\t__webpack_modules__[moduleId](module, module.exports, __webpack_require__);\\n\\n\\t// Return the exports of the module\\n\\treturn module.exports;\\n}\\n\\n// expose the modules object (__webpack_modules__)\\n__webpack_require__.m = __webpack_modules__;\\n\\n\",\"__webpack_require__.g = (function() {\\n\\tif window;\\n\\t}\\n})();\",\"__webpack_require__.o = (obj, prop) => (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(obj, prop))\",\"var scriptUrl;\\nif (__webpack_require__.g.importScripts) scriptUrl = __webpack_require__.g.location + \\\"\\\";\\nvar document = __webpack_require__.g.document;\\nif (!scriptUrl && document) {\\n\\tif (document.currentScript && document.currentScript.tagName.toUpperCase() === 'SCRIPT')\\n\\t\\tscriptUrl = document.currentScript.src;\\n\\tif (!scriptUrl) {\\n\\t\\tvar scripts = document.getElementsByTagName(\\\"script\\\");\\n\\t\\tif(scripts.length) {\\n\\t\\t\\tvar i = scripts.length - 1;\\n\\t\\t\\twhile (i > -1 && (!scriptUrl || !/^http(s?):/.test(scriptUrl))) scriptUrl = scripts[i--].src;\\n\\t\\t}\\n\\t}\\n}\\n// When supporting browsers where an automatic publicPath is not supported you must specify an output.publicPath manually via configuration\\n// or pass an empty string (\\\"\\\") and set the __webpack_public_path__ variable from your code to use your own logic.\\nif (!scriptUrl) throw new Error(\\\"Automatic publicPath is not supported in this browser\\\");\\nscriptUrl = scriptUrl.replace(/^blob:/, \\\"\\\").replace(/#.*$/, \\\"\\\").replace(/\\\\?.*$/, \\\"\\\").replace(/\\\\/[^\\\\/]+$/, \\\"/\\\");\\n__webpack_require__.p = scriptUrl;\",\"__webpack_require__.b = (typeof document !== 'undefined' && document.baseURI) || self.location.href;\\n\\n// object to store loaded and loading chunks\\n// undefined = chunk not loaded, null = chunk preloaded/prefetched\\n// [resolve, reject, Promise] = chunk loading, 0 = chunk loaded\\nvar installedChunks = {\\n\\t792: 0\\n};\\n\\n// no chunk on demand loading\\n\\n// no prefetching\\n\\n// no preloaded\\n\\n// no HMR\\n\\n// no HMR manifest\\n\\n// no on chunks loaded\\n\\n// no jsonp function\",\"console.log(new URL(\\\"./file.css\\\",   ● minify option › should work and merge source maps when `minify` mixes CSS minimizers using `cssnano`, `csso`, `cleanCss`, `lightningCss`, `swcCss`, and `esbuild`

    expect(received).toMatchSnapshot(hint)

    Snapshot name: `minify option should work and merge source maps when \`minify\` mixes CSS minimizers using \`cssnano\`, \`csso\`, \`cleanCss\`, \`lightningCss\`, \`swcCss\`, and \`esbuild\`: assets 1`

    + Received  + 3

      Object {
    -   "2b2163fccc87d86ff5f6.css": ".foo{color:red;background:#00f}.bar{margin:10px;padding:10px}

empty string (\\\"\\\") and set the __webpack_public_path__ variable from your code to use your own logic.\\nif (!scriptUrl) throw new Error(\\\"Automatic publicPath is not supported in this browser\\\");\\nscriptUrl = scriptUrl.replace(/^blob:/, \\\"\\\").replace(/#.*$/, \\\"\\\").replace(/\\\\?.*$/, \\\"\\\").replace(/\\\\/[^\\\\/]+$/, \\\"/\\\");\\n__webpack_require__.p =
